title: Pack of 50 x Clamshell Takeaway Boxes 7" X 5" Disposable Fish and Chips Box for HOT & COLD FOOD, Heavy Duty Takeaway Food Container, Tab Lock Closure Food Safe Bagasse Lunch Box Burger Box
features: :<>: PACK OF 50, 100% NATURAL STRONG BAGASSE BURGER BOXES, 7"x5"/18x13cm :<> Made from High density Bagasse sugarcane pulp. These Boxes are Super rigid Strong do not not Fall apart Crumble or Dissolve when USED with Liquids and Hot Foods. => PERFECT FOR HOME & BUSINESS:- Suitable for Both Personal Use and Professional Food Service Businesses, such as Restaurants, Delis, Cafes, Food Courts, Business Events, Parties, School, Office Kitchen, looking for Eco-friendly takeaway options. => DIMENSIONS: 18x12.7x6.5cm (7x5x2.5 inches) when closed -- 21oz / 600ml

:<>: ECOFRIENDLY and BIODEGRADABLE <> Our 100% Biodegradable and Eco friendly to go Containers are Made from Bagasse; the fibre that’s left after sugar cane has been pulped and the juice extracted. It’s a Safe and Non-toxic alternative to Plastic Food Containers.

|<>| MICROWAVE and FREEZER SAFE <> Our Bagasse Clamshell take away Burger boxes are Freezer and Microwave safe. These clam shell boxes won’t tear, Crack or Disintegrate when heated or frozen. ==> Also can be USED for Both Hot and Cold foods.

<|> PREMIUM QUALITY <> Our Clamshell Takeaway Boxes are packaged only after passing rigorous Quality testing procedures and are truly the best on the market today. With a Sleek white design and optimal size, these boxes add sophistication to your meal presentations.

|<>| STURDY & STRONG <> These Boxes have a Sturdy construction and they can withstand the weight of various Foods without Bending or Leaking. These Boxes can be used on different Occasions like Parties, Picnics and gatherings and you can serve a variety of meals. Liquid resistant and Super Strong. ==> Perfect NATURAL Alternative to Plastic Containers.
